visual_summary: The image captures a descending escalator leading toward a public space with people walking and standing. The walls feature textured white concrete panels and a distinctive section of red, yellow, and gray tiles. Several individuals are visible on the escalator and in the plaza below wearing winter clothing.
location: Underground metro or station entrance leading to a public outdoor space
continuity_anchors: escalator with distinct yellow caution markings
decorative red and yellow wall tile pattern
textured white concrete panels on walls
plausible_actions: people stepping on or off the escalator
someone stopping to look at notices or storefronts
cinematic_notes: use a downward tracking shot to emphasize descent into the station
natural overhead lighting casting soft shadows
wide shot for crowd density, close-ups for individual emotion
contrast between the dull concrete and colorful tiles for visual interest

visual_summary: A blue and white subway train is stationary at an underground platform with passengers visible inside and a few walking or standing on the platform. The platform features yellow safety strips and a tiled floor, with overhead lighting illuminating the scene.
continuity_anchors: yellow safety strip along platform edge
plausible_actions: people walking or talking on phones on the platform
announcement or arrival of next train
cinematic_notes: use long tracking shots following commuters along the platform
play with reflections on train windows for atmospheric close-ups
capture contrast between warm interior light and cooler platform lighting
angle shots to emphasize depth and leading lines of the tunnel and platform

visual_summary: This image shows a modern subway platform with glass safety doors separating the platform from the tracks. Several people are waiting, some standing and some seated, with one person pulling a suitcase and another wearing a white puffer jacket. Fluorescent ceiling lights illuminate the clean tiled floor and the platform, which has a tactile strip for the visually impaired.
continuity_anchors: glass platform safety doors with metallic frames
distinct fluorescent lighting strips in ceiling
tiled flooring with a central tactile strip
people standing or seated facing the platform
plausible_actions: commuters boarding or exiting the subway train
people looking at their phones or checking the schedule
walking down the platform or towards stairs
someone sitting down or getting up from the bench
cinematic_notes: use leading lines of tiles and ceiling lights for depth shots
play with reflections in the glass platform doors for layered visuals
tracking shots following people with luggage
use natural fluorescent lighting to create a clinical, urban atmosphere

visual_summary: The image shows a view from inside a train or tram looking out through a window at multiple railway tracks and a distant industrial or transportation area under an overcast sky. The central part of the window has a door with a sign in both English and French prohibiting holding the doors. The scene outside is slightly blurred by the window's grime and reflections.
location: Inside a train or tram overlooking railway tracks and an industrial or transportation zone
continuity_anchors: sign on the door prohibiting holding the doors
plausible_actions: passengers looking outside or entering/exiting the train
cinematic_notes: use reflections on the window to create layering effects
capture changing weather or light conditions through the window
frame characters interacting with the door and warning sign
